name: APPLIED MATERIALS INC /DE
summary: Applied Materials, Inc. is a leader in materials engineering solutions for semiconductor manufacturing. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and services wafer fabrication equipment used to produce semiconductor chips. Its two reportable segments are Semiconductor Systems, which provides equipment for patterning, transistor/interconnect fabrication, metrology, inspection, and advanced packaging, and Applied Global Services (AGS), which offers services, spares, and factory automation software for customer fabrication plants globally.

products.name: Semiconductor Systems Equipment
products.description: Wide range of equipment for semiconductor chip fabrication including patterning, transistor, interconnect, metrology, inspection, and advanced packaging systems.

products.name: Patterning Systems
products.description: Systems addressing shrinking pattern dimensions and complexity in vertical stacking for advanced semiconductor devices.

products.name: Process Control Systems
products.description: Optical and eBeam technologies for inspecting and reviewing critical semiconductor architectures to improve chip yields.

products.name: Advanced Packaging Systems
products.description: Materials engineering systems enabling heterogeneous integration by connecting multiple chips together.

products.name: AGS Services and Spares
products.description: Transactional and subscription services, spares, and support to optimize semiconductor equipment performance globally.

products.name: Factory Automation Software
products.description: Software to optimize plant performance and productivity for customer fabrication plants.

products.name: 200mm Equipment
products.description: Equipment manufactured and sold to customers serving non-leading-edge markets; moving to Semiconductor Systems segment in fiscal 2026.

products.name: Display Manufacturing Equipment
products.description: Equipment for the display industry, reported under the Corporate and Other category.
